caption: A person with blonde hair wearing a dark t-shirt is visible in a small inset window in the bottom-left corner of a screen displaying a video game interface. He is positioned in front of a background featuring a decorated holiday tree with white lights. The main screen is titled "AUCTIONS & TRADES" and features several sections: "AUCTION HOUSE," "TRADE BLOCK," "MY AUCTIONS," "MY BIDS," "MY TRADE BLOCK," and "MY TRADE OFFERS." The "AUCTION HOUSE" section contains a white gavel icon and the text "Use filters and sort tools to find and bid on items." The "TRADE BLOCK" section displays a white arrow icon. In the top right, numeric values are shown, including "173,037," "0," "14,869," and "2,943,543," alongside "LV 19" and a "91" badge. Across the frames, the person in the inset window remains present, though his facial expression and posture shift slightly as he speaks.
